runner: Claude Fable 5 via Claude Code (VS Code extension)
notes: Plan written as a comment block at the top of the file, then followed. Canvas game (1280x720, CSS-letterboxed) with HTML/CSS overlay menus: main menu with animated lawn diorama, how-to-play, persistent top-10 localStorage leaderboard with name entry, pause and end screens. 5 plants (Sunflower/Peashooter/Snow Pea/Wall-nut/Cherry Bomb) with costs + cooldown sweeps, 4 zombie types (walker/cone/bucket/runner), 8 escalating waves with banners and a tick-marked progress bar, sun economy (sky drops + sunflowers, click-to-collect fly-to-counter), shovel, lawn mowers, hover ghost previews, hotkeys 1-5/Esc/M, WebAudio synth SFX with mute, particles, floating text, screen shake, damage flashes, win/lose flow into the leaderboard. All art is vector canvas drawing, no assets. Two authoring fixes before finalizing: a brace typo caught by a machine syntax check, and the leaderboard back-button flow after game over.
